name: watchllm-vscode
description: Deterministic save-path governance for autonomous coding agents.

watchllm.pythonPath.markdownDescription: Python executable used to run the local WatchLLM kernel.

watchllm.kernelPath.markdownDescription: Kernel invocation arguments passed to Python. This value is read as configuration only and is not executed through a shell.

enumDescriptions: Block saves when the kernel reports a violation.

watchllm.rustCliPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to the `watchllm-cli` Rust binary (e.g. `d:/watchllm/runtime/target/release/watchllm-cli.exe`). When set and the binary exists on disk, the extension uses the Rust runtime instead of the Python kernel subprocess for lower latency. Leave `null` to use the Python kernel (default).

scripts.test: npm run compile && node --test out/test/kernelExecutor.test.js out/test/saveHook.test.js out/test/diagnostics.test.js
